hero.headline: Accounting that works as hard as you do.
hero.subheadline: We help small businesses and individuals navigate tax, bookkeeping, and financial planning with confidence.

whatWeDo.headline: We handle the numbers so you can focus on growth.
whatWeDo.body: Linked Accounting provides tax, bookkeeping, and financial advisory services designed for small business owners and individuals who want clarity and confidence in their finances.

services.title: Tax Planning
services.description: Strategic tax preparation and planning to minimize your liability and keep you compliant year-round.

services.title: Bookkeeping
services.description: Accurate, monthly bookkeeping so your books are always clean and your decisions are always informed.

services.title: Financial Advisory
services.description: Forward-looking financial guidance tailored to your business goals and growth stage.

services.title: Payroll Services
services.description: Reliable, on-time payroll processing so your team gets paid correctly every time.
